lifecycles.description: Source SBOM representing the repository at development time. Includes all direct dependencies, development tooling, bundled assets, and skill sub-components.

component.name: anthropic-agent-skills
component.description: Anthropic example Agent Skills — a curated collection of skills extending Claude Code capabilities across document processing (docx, xlsx, pdf, pptx), visual design, MCP building, web testing, GIF creation, and more.

components.name: algorithmic-art
components.description: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration.

components.name: brand-guidelines
components.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts.

components.name: canvas-design
components.description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy.

components.name: doc-coauthoring
components.description: Structured workflow for co-authoring documentation, proposals, technical specs, and decision docs.

components.name: docx
components.description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx files) with tracked changes and comments.

components.name: frontend-design
components.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality.

components.name: internal-comms
components.description: Resources for writing internal communications: status reports, newsletters, FAQs, incident reports.

components.name: mcp-builder
components.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers in Python or Node/TypeScript.

components.name: pdf
components.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation: read, extract, merge, split, fill forms, encrypt, and OCR.

components.name: pptx
components.description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate PowerPoint presentations (.pptx files).

components.name: skill-creator
components.description: Guide for creating and packaging new Agent Skills that extend Claude Code capabilities.

components.name: slack-gif-creator
components.description: Create animated GIFs optimized for Slack with size constraints and validation tools.

components.name: theme-factory
components.description: Toolkit for styling artifacts (slides, docs, HTML pages) with 10 pre-set themes or custom themes.

components.name: webapp-testing
components.description: Toolkit for testing local web applications using Playwright: screenshots, browser logs, UI verification.

components.name: web-artifacts-builder
components.description: Suite for creating multi-component HTML artifacts using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

components.name: xlsx
components.description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx files) with formula recalculation.

components.name: anthropic
components.description: Anthropic's official Python client library for the Claude AI API.

components.name: mcp
components.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Python SDK for building MCP clients and servers.

components.name: Pillow
components.description: Python Imaging Library fork — image reading, writing, and processing.

components.name: imageio
components.description: Easy image reading and writing using a large set of formats including GIF.

components.name: imageio-ffmpeg
components.description: FFmpeg wrapper for imageio — provides video read/write support via FFmpeg binaries.

components.name: numpy
components.description: Fundamental package for scientific computing with Python — N-dimensional array support.

components.name: defusedxml
components.description: Defusing XML bombs and other XML vulnerabilities — safe XML parsing for untrusted documents.

components.name: pypdf
components.description: Pure Python PDF library for reading, writing, splitting, merging, and annotating PDFs.

components.name: pdf2image
components.description: Python wrapper around Poppler's pdftoppm and pdftocairo to convert PDFs to PIL images.

components.name: pdfplumber
components.description: Plumb a PDF for detailed information about each text character, rectangle, and line.

components.name: openpyxl
components.description: Python library to read/write Excel 2010 xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm files.

components.name: playwright
components.description: Python bindings for the Playwright browser automation library.

components.name: PyYAML
components.description: YAML parser and emitter for Python.

components.name: LibreOffice
components.description: Free and open-source office suite. Used via soffice CLI for document conversion and rendering in docx, pptx, and xlsx skills.

components.name: FFmpeg
components.description: Complete, cross-platform multimedia framework. Bundled by imageio-ffmpeg for video encoding in the slack-gif-creator skill.

components.name: Poppler
components.description: PDF rendering library. Required as a system dependency by pdf2image (pdftoppm) in the pdf skill.

components.name: Node.js
components.description: JavaScript runtime environment. Required (>=18) by web-artifacts-builder for React/Vite scaffolding and by pptx for pptxgenjs.

components.name: pnpm
components.description: Fast, disk space efficient Node.js package manager. Used by init-artifact.sh to scaffold React projects.
